case_title: MARK TELEFUS VS. HECTOR ALBERDI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TELEFUS, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT ALBERDI, HECTOR DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-12-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-11-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-28-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TELEFUS, MARK JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF NOV-09-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-19-2012. SEP-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-29-2012.
ARBITRATOR LAWRENCE GORDON LOSSING APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-30-2012 THROUGH FEB-28-2013.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT , CONDITIONAL, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TELEFUS, MARK
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALBERDI, HECTOR
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR WILLIAM THOMAS MULVIHILL.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BY MAIL ON 5/26/12, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TELEFUS, MARK SERVED MAY-26-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALBERDI, HECTOR
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR GEORGE W. KORTE.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
